shared_case_surface: public-safe experience verdict packets covering clean bounded, boundary-leak, and authority-overreach cases
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the cases only if the replacement preserves the same bounded protocol-integrity ask class, keeps the bundle inspectable without private house style, and still supports a bounded verdict read on the same family.
public_safe_requirements: visible contract language is sufficient for bounded review
boundary notes remain weaker than runtime or governance authority
